data.name: Sex Novel - Swingers Yacht
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL with stunning HD visuals and steamy ANIMATIONS.
Two adventurous couples set sail on a luxurious yacht for a week full of passion.

GAME DESCRIPTION 
Ella and Dan met Michelle and Mark at a friend’s wedding, instantly bonding over their love for the sea. Neither couple was wealthy, but every spare dollar went toward chasing horizons, making them perfect travel companions.
On a whim, they pooled their savings and booked a week aboard a luxurious yacht, ready for sun, fun, and a little adventure. Now, the four near-strangers set sail under the blazing sun, ready to see where the tides take them.

Will Dan and Ella be able to keep their unashamed passion in check?
Will Mark and Michelle be scandalized or secretly intrigued by their new friends?

Dive into this steamy new visual novel and see what happens when temptation runs wild on the open waters.

FEATURES:  

- 250+ renders
- 16  movies
- Long story, divided among several mini episodes which you can replay anytime.
  Play each episode until its end to unlock the next episode. Once unlocked, an episode can be replayed anytime.
- HD renders and movies

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
